title: All stars elementals
description: This mod adds elemental powers to minecraft.
body:
The powers in this mod are very inspired by one piece, i'm not a professional expect this mod to be buggy.

**READ THIS: Right now, darkness has no buff, and electricity has no nerf, only the first attack of poison and fire work. This mod was built with multiplayer in mind, some elements are worse than others when you play in single player.**

**Fire's first attack visuals is broken, because the texture it is using isn't in the default photon, since i'm using mcreator there are no plugins for 1.21.1, i'll try to make a modpack where the texture is in already, or you could go in the mod and take the texture from the assets folder and put it in the ldlib2 folder. If you know how i can make it work, please comment to tell me.**

This mod adds elemental powers etc, you can choose what power you want when you start the game but you won't get all your abilities. You will start with only a passive buff and nerf, and 1 ability, you can unlock your abilities by getting runes in vanilla structures, then you need to craft the rune together with an item related to your element to get a rune for your element, after that just use it and you will unlock another ability, you need 3 runes to get all your abilities. I recommend using a mod light JEI, REI or EMI to know how to craft everything.

This mods adds a cassette player, if you chose sound, you'll need it for your passive, and also your ultimate when it's added, for your passive you'll also need to craft a cassette.

Modrinth: https://modrinth.com/mod/all-stars-elementals

Made with Mcreator
